summary: Completed testing of BreakdownDrawer refinement (iteration 232). All 16 features verified - backend API and frontend UI working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BreakdownDrawer refinement testing complete (iteration 232). All features verified: [1] Drawer opens via 'View full breakdown' button (data-testid='view-breakdown-btn'). [2] Narrative section shows max 3 bullets (recap_hero, biggest_shift, period_label). [3] Narrative does NOT duplicate Insights content. [4] Momentum section shows schools grouped by heated_up, cooling_off, holding_steady. [5] Momentum groups have progressive reveal (+N more toggle) for groups with >2 items. [6] Per-school section initially shows 3 schools (verified). [7] Per-school section has 'Show N more schools' progressive reveal toggle. [8] Clicking 'Show more schools' reveals remaining schools with animation. [9] Insights section shows max 3 coaching-focused actionable tips. [10] Insights are coaching-oriented (e.g., 'your outreach is working', 'try a different approach'). [11] Freshness timestamp shown at bottom (e.g., 'Insights updated 4m ago'). [12] No system terminology visible (no 'score', 'priority factor'). [13] Drawer has slide-in animation (bd-panel class) and staggered content reveal (bd-stagger classes). [14] Clicking backdrop closes the drawer. [15] Close button (X) closes the drawer. [16] Backend /api/athlete/momentum-recap returns ai_insights as coaching tips (max 3).

backend_api.created_at: PASS - Returns ISO timestamp for freshness
backend_api.no_system_terminology: PASS - No 'score' or 'priority factor' in response

narrative_section.no_duplicate_insights: PASS - Narrative content differs from Insights

momentum_section.progressive_reveal: PASS - +1 more toggle in Gaining momentum group

schools_section.initial_count: PASS - Shows 3 schools initially (Emory, Stanford, Florida)
schools_section.expand_animation: PASS - Reveals UCLA, Creighton with animation
schools_section.collapse_toggle: PASS - Changes to 'Show less' after expand

insights_section.coaching_language: PASS - Contains 'outreach is working', 'try a different approach', 'focus on quality'
insights_section.no_status_descriptions: PASS - No 'is at stage', 'has score' language

animations.slide_in: PASS - bd-panel class for drawer slide

BreakdownDrawer.js.narrative_uses_recap_hero: PASS - buildNarrative() uses data.recap_hero, data.biggest_shift, data.period_label
BreakdownDrawer.js.momentum_progressive_reveal: PASS - MomentumGroup shows 2 items initially with +N more toggle
BreakdownDrawer.js.animations_defined: PASS - CSS keyframes bd-fade-in, bd-slide-in, bd-content-in
